rule_d_compliance: STRICT — did not open any iter_2/iter_3/iter_4 audit artifacts, did not read r15_sample.json, r16_fixes_log.json, *.pre_r9.bak, audit/, checkpoints/, evidence/step_06_audit.md, step_07_export.md, session-23 logs, or RETROSPECTIVE.md. narrative: Independent fresh dual-track audit of 10 release pages from canonical Phase 1 v1.0.1-candidate output. Zero release-impacting defects across 150 leaves. Two WARN findings, both cosmetic and non-blocking: (1) p283::1 EN choice translations mix 'Task' and 'Activity' for '作業' within the same question; (2) p378::2 NAS jp definition concatenates body paragraph with test-summary bullet producing a tautological tail (faithfully mirrored to zh/en). All choice markers correctly follow convention (jp ア/イ/ウ/エ; zh/en A/B/C/D). All answer indices align with answer-key footers. All numerical/unit data preserved verbatim in tables. Glossary entries distinct. Verdict: APPROVE for release.
